i %3C= total; i++ %7B    // Iterate from 1 up to the album total%0A%09%09if !ownedMap%5Bi%5D %7B // If the ID is NOT in our %22possessed%22 map...%0A%09%09%09missing = append(missing, i) // ...add it to the missing list%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%09return missing // Return all IDs needed to finish the album%0A%7D%0A%0A// FormatOutput converts a slice to a string or returns %22N%22%0Afunc FormatOutput(list %5B%5Dint) string %7B%0A%09if len(list) == 0 %7B // Check if the slice is empty%0A%09%09return %22N%22 // Return %22N%22 as per the problem requirement%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09strValues := make(%5B%5Dstring, len(list)) // Create a string slice of the same size%0A%09for i, v := range list %7B               // Loop through the integer slice%0A%09%09strValues%5Bi%5D = strconv.Itoa(v) // Convert each integer to a string%0A%09%7D%0A%09return strings.Join(strValues, %22 %22) // Merge strings with a space between them%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09var totalAlbum, countOwned int // Declare variables for the initial metadata%0A%0A%09// Read the total album capacity and the number of stickers Baruel has%0A%09if _, err := fmt.Scan(&totalAlbum, &countOwned); err != nil %7B%0A%09%09return // Exit if there is an error reading the input%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09owned := make(%5B%5Dint, countOwned) // Initialize a slice for the owned stickers%0A%09for i := 0; i %3C countOwned; i++ %7B // Loop for the amount of stickers owned%0A%09%09fmt.Scan(&owned%5Bi%5D) // Read each sticker ID into the slice%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09duplicates := FindDuplicates(owned)      // Call function to find repeats%0A%09missing := FindMissing(totalAlbum, owned) // Call function to find gaps%0A%0A%09fmt.Println(FormatOutput(duplicates)) // Print the formatted duplicates line%0A%09fmt.Println(FormatOutput(missing))    // Print the formatted missing line%0A%7D
